ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shellfish" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shellfish specimen */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the shellfish (M, F, I) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the shellfish */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the shellfish */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the shellfish */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the shellfish */,
  "shucked_weight" REAL /* Shucked weight of the shellfish */,
  "viscera_weight" REAL /* Viscera weight of the shellfish */,
  "shell_weight" REAL /* Shell weight of the shellfish */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the shellfish */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "shell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shell type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the specimen was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the specimen */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the specimen */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data record to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_shell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shell_type_id") REFERENCES shell_types ("shell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species is commonly found */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shell_types" (
  "shell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shell type */,
  "shell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shell type */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the shell type */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the shell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shell type */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the shell type is commonly found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the researcher is involved in */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shellfish specimen the measurement was taken on */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., length, diameter) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, mm) */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to take the measurement */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES shellfish ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weighings" (
  "weighing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weighing */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shellfish specimen the weighing was taken on */,
  "weight_type" TEXT /* Type of weight (e.g., shucked weight, viscera weight) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the weighing */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the weighing (e.g., g, kg) */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the weighing was taken */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to take the weighing */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the weighing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weighing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weighings_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES shellfish ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weighings_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age determination */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shellfish specimen the age was determined for */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the shellfish */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the age (e.g., years, months) */,
  "date_determined" TEXT /* Date when the age was determined */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the age */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who determined the age */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES shellfish ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
